channel.title: bbiiirdbphd TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbiiirdbphd

item.title: Manual stitch w/ @Connie Chen Your #god is used as an excuse by/for pedophiles/rapists. I could not be angrier. #epsteinfiles #rage #christians #charliekirk
item.description: Manual stitch w/ @Connie Chen Your #god is used as an excuse by/for pedophiles/rapists. I could not be angrier. #epsteinfiles #rage #christians #charliekirk

item.title: #greenscreen I made the Epstein-patriarchal god disregard of Our consent connection in clips from my last video around two months ago. And I need your help.
item.description: #greenscreen I made the Epstein-patriarchal god disregard of Our consent connection in clips from my last video around two months ago. And I need your help.

item.title: I have published articles, a dissertation, and books for years about the sociosexually violent u.s. ecology. Specifically from my millennial experience.
item.description: I have published articles, a dissertation, and books for years about the sociosexually violent u.s. ecology. Specifically from my millennial experience.

item.title: Direct link to it is in my link tree in all my social media platform bios. Use coupon code TIKTOKFAN or click the link in my link tree until the end of February to get a significant discount for the rest of this month: https://www.udemy.com/course/critica

item.title: Please help my cat, Twinkle, and I continue to live in a house, eat food, and catalyze liberatory change by supporting my work.
item.description: Please help my cat, Twinkle, and I continue to live in a house, eat food, and catalyze liberatory change by supporting my work.

item.title: The screenshots of #PokerVR mods / developer not properly taking seriously or handling my account of discriminations, harassment, and virtual harm that I’ve witnessed goes on on their app everyday. They demonstrated a lack of responsible policies, account
item.description: The screenshots of #PokerVR mods / developer not properly taking seriously or handling my account of discriminations, harassment, and virtual harm that I’ve witnessed goes on on their app everyday. They demonstrated a lack of responsible policies, account

item.title: Please help me find a lawyer who will represent me for my first amendment right being violated. In the meantime, I need your support of my work ASAP or I will be homeless soon.
item.description: Please help me find a lawyer who will represent me for my first amendment right being violated. In the meantime, I need your support of my work ASAP or I will be homeless soon.

item.title: Patience for others unlearning, as it’s own lesson, is difficult.
item.description: Patience for others unlearning, as it’s own lesson, is difficult.

item.title: Why I’ve designed / am designing my online courses. Critical Media Ecology 101: Why We Are Like This is available now. F**k That: What We Can Do About It should be available sometime in the next weekish.

item.title: My new Udemy course “Critical Media Ecology 101: Why We Are Like This” will be live pretty soon. Please share to anyone curious why we are like this and what we can do about it 🌻🐦‍⬛
